steps.title: Square the side scale factor
steps.content: Area scales by the square of the side-length scale factor. The side lengths of square A are $72$ times the side lengths of square B.

steps.title: Compute the area factor
steps.content: Square the scale factor: $$ k=72^2=5{,}184 $$ The area of square A is $5{,}184$ times the area of square B. The answer is A.
